meta.title: Counterbalance Ep. 11: Biden's Realignment in the Middle East
meta.description:
Read Mike & Tony's article: https://www.hudson.org/research/16906-the-realignment

This week Marshall interviewed Mike and his co-author Tony Badran about their new article in Tablet titled The Realignment, which argues that Biden is following in Obama’s footsteps in the Middle East by seeking a broad strategic accommodation with Iran, one that goes way beyond the nuclear deal and has sinister implications for the United States.

Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/counterbalance/id1553960915
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/4j9FejEcp2NFsawahn9OfM
